Scholarly guesses were made for 'ዘይድራነስ' and 'ብጆምሶን', identifying them as likely foreign proper nouns based on their structure and context alongside other known proper names like 'አድለር' and 'ማሲናስ'. All remaining words were lemmatized to their infinitive or base noun form, assigned comprehensive English synonyms, and tagged with their major part of speech.
